edges.evidence_quote: the Neo-fascist and Neo-Nazi web forum IronMarch.org, which, prior to its shutdown in 2017, had been linked to several acts of Neo-Nazi terrorism and violent militant groups such as the Nordic Resistance Movement
edges.context: Both groups were linked to the IronMarch forum.

edges.evidence_quote: the Neo-fascist and Neo-Nazi web forum IronMarch.org, which, prior to its shutdown in 2017, had been linked to several acts of Neo-Nazi terrorism and violent militant groups such as the Nordic Resistance Movement, National Action, CasaPound, and Golden Dawn
edges.context: Both groups were linked to the IronMarch forum.

edges.evidence_quote: As of 2018, Atomwaffen had ties to various affiliated neo-Nazi groups and the fascist Satanist Order of Nine Angles (O9A), an organization which advocates rape and human sacrifice.

edges.evidence_quote: The ToB infiltrated and effectively took over the AWD, beginning in 2017.

edges.context: Atomwaffen members play key roles in organizing the Active Club Network.

edges.context: Sonnenkrieg members were previously involved with National Action.

edges.context: Sonnenkrieg Division was influenced by the Order of Nine Angles.

edges.context: Northern Order is affiliated with Order of Nine Angles.

edges.evidence_quote: He was also accused of being affiliated with The Base.

edges.context: Atomwaffen members attended Azov training camps.

edges.evidence_quote: In October 2018, a group which was modeled after Atomwaffen and called itself the Feuerkrieg Division was established in the Baltic states
edges.context: Feuerkrieg Division was modeled after Atomwaffen Division.

edges.evidence_quote: Atomwaffen had a full-fledged chapter in Italy with 38 members, formed in Savona. The group was called Nuovo Ordine Sociale
edges.context: Nuovo Ordine Sociale is the Italian chapter of Atomwaffen Division.

edges.evidence_quote: a splinter group of the Italian Atomwaffen "Nuovo Ordine Sociale-Sole Nero"
edges.context: Nuovo Ordine Sociale-Sole Nero is a splinter group of Nuovo Ordine Sociale.

edges.evidence_quote: a man from Bologna volunteered to fight in the Palestinian group Lions' Den
edges.context: A member of Nuovo Ordine Sociale-Sole Nero volunteered for Lions' Den.

edges.evidence_quote: Atomwaffen Division Finland "Siitoin Squadron" ( AWDSS ) was formed after the ban of the Nordic Resistance Movement (NRM) in 2019, following members of the underground group embracing accelerationism and occultism.
edges.context: AWDSS formed from former NRM members after NRM was banned.

edges.evidence_quote: AWDSS also maintained particularly close relations with the Feuerkrieg Division in neighboring Estonia.
edges.context: AWDSS had close relations with Feuerkrieg Division.

edges.evidence_quote: AWDSS was connected to and shared membership with Finnish O9A nexions.
edges.context: AWDSS shared membership with Finnish O9A nexions.

edges.evidence_quote: Atomwaffen and Finnish lodge of the Black Order also formed a border patrol militia in co-operation, recruiting former military police.
edges.context: Atomwaffen and Black Order cooperated to form a border patrol militia.

edges.evidence_quote: According to Seura magazine, some members had previously served in the Azov Battalion.
edges.context: Some Atomwaffen members had previously served in Azov Battalion.

edges.evidence_quote: In addition to Azov, the Russian Imperial Movement had also provided paramilitary training to the Finnish neo-Nazis.
edges.context: Russian Imperial Movement provided paramilitary training to Finnish neo-Nazis, including Atomwaffen members.

edges.evidence_quote: Atomwaffen Argentina was member of Iron Order, a coalition of accelerationist groups.
edges.context: AWD Argentina was a member of Iron Order coalition.

edges.evidence_quote: Gabriel Rodrigues Castiglioni, perpetrator of two shootings that occurred in Aracruz, used to be active in Terrorgram Collective and during the shooting wore a swastika patch and Atomwaffen uniform.
edges.context: A shooter was active in Terrorgram Collective and wore Atomwaffen uniform, indicating connection.
